name: HefestoAI
description: AI-powered code quality guardian. Pre-merge governance for AI-generated code: semantic drift detection, security scanning, and complexity analysis across 21 formats.

skills.name: Code Analysis
skills.description: Analyze code files or directories for security vulnerabilities, complexity issues, semantic drift, and code smells. Supports Python, TypeScript, JavaScript, Java, Go, Rust, C#, plus 14 DevOps and Cloud IaC formats.

skills.name: Security Scanning
skills.description: Detect HARDCODED_SECRET, SQL_INJECTION, COMMAND_INJECTION, PATH_TRAVERSAL, UNSAFE_DESERIALIZATION and other security vulnerabilities.

skills.name: Semantic Drift Detection
skills.description: Detect when AI-generated code deviates from intended behavior. Validates that code does what the prompt asked for.

authentication.credentials: Set HEFESTO_API_KEY environment variable or X-API-Key header
